CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (event_id INT, event_timestamp TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '1992-03-22'), (2, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-08'), (3, TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01'), (4, TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01'), (5, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31');
SELECT event_id, dayname(event_timestamp) AS day_name FROM test_timestamps;
SELECT dayname(COALESCE(MAX(event_timestamp), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)) AS max_event_day_name FROM test_timestamps;
SELECT event_id, (SELECT dayname(event_timestamp) FROM test_timestamps WHERE event_id = 1) AS first_event_day FROM test_timestamps;
SELECT t1.event_id, t2.event_id, dayname(t1.event_timestamp) AS t1_day_name, dayname(t2.event_timestamp) AS t2_day_name FROM test_timestamps t1 JOIN test_timestamps t2 ON t1.event_id < t2.event_id;
SELECT event_id, dayname(CAST(CONCAT(YEAR(event_timestamp), '-09-25') AS TIMESTAMP)) AS special_day_name FROM test_timestamps;
